product.body_html:
Most fish oil is so diluted it would take 6 capsules to equal one dose of ours — that's not supplementation, that's decoration.

Not all fish oil is the same. Standard fish oil capsules often contain 30% or less of actual EPA and DHA — the two omega-3 fatty acids your body can actually use. The rest is filler: other fats, oxidised oils, fillers that do nothing. Romira Omega-3 Triple Strength is a concentrated, molecularly distilled formula that delivers a high therapeutic dose of EPA and DHA in every capsule. EPA (eicosapentaenoic acid) is the anti-inflammatory workhorse — it suppresses the inflammatory signalling molecules that drive joint pain, cardiovascular disease, and chronic illness. DHA (docosahexaenoic acid) is a structural fat: your brain is 60% fat, and DHA is the dominant omega-3 in both brain tissue and the retina of your eye. You don't make enough of it. You have to get it from food or supplements.

Molecular distillation removes heavy metals, PCBs, and mercury — the legitimate concern most people have about fish oil — leaving you with pharmaceutical-grade oil that's clean, concentrated, and effective. If your joints ache, your triglycerides are high, your brain feels foggy, or you're not getting oily fish 3+ times a week, this is non-negotiable.

Key Benefits

  • ✓ Triple-strength EPA + DHA — high therapeutic dose per capsule
  • ✓ Reduces systemic inflammation and joint pain
  • ✓ Clinically shown to lower triglycerides and support heart health
  • ✓ Supports brain clarity, focus, and mood stability
  • ✓ DHA maintains retinal and visual health
  • ✓ Molecularly distilled — tested clean of mercury and heavy metals
  • ✓ Supports joint lubrication and cartilage health

Formulation

Triple-strength fish oil concentrate, molecularly distilled for purity. High EPA and DHA content per serving — no fillers, no watered-down oil. Enteric coating optional for zero fishy aftertaste.

Who It's For

People dealing with joint pain, chronic inflammation, brain fog, elevated triglycerides, or anyone not getting enough oily fish in their diet — which is most people.

Give your heart, brain, and joints the omega-3s they're starving for — upgrade to Romira Triple Strength today.
